description: Case style: Stainless steel, circular case with branding at the back, has a rotating bezel with markingsDial style: Brown dual toned dial, white hour and minute markings, white hands with steel colour accents, branding near the 12 hour mark, three face chronograph displayFeatures: Screw to reset time, chronograph displayStrap style: Genuine leather strap with an an adjustable tang closureWater resistance: Up to 100 mWarranty: Limited one year warranty
